title: Shimmer Glint
description: Enchanted items look like they have a shimmer effect as if the item is shiny and being held up to the sun.
body:
This resource pack adds an effect to all enchanted items that makes it shimmer as if its reflective metal moving around while being hit by the sun.

See the effect in action on [Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_DAjmoMQxrc)

You can further customize this pack on [mcglint.com](https://mcglint.com/) which is a website made by me
